channel.title: Source of Truth
channel.description: Source of Truth — Stefano Costa's blog

item.title: May Monthly Business Ahas
item.description: A heuristic for two-way decisions; Never trust a good marketer!

item.title: April Monthly Business Ahas
item.description: Be a consultant, not an academic; why building companies when you can copy good ones?; Weyland-Yutani can't do marketing; build business proprioception.

item.title: March Monthly Business Ahas
item.description: Many businesses fail not because the business is hard, but because the wrong people start them; whether your market is problem-aware and solution-aware determines your entire marketing strategy.

item.title: February Monthly Business Ahas
item.description: Mass market and premium market require opposite communication strategies; always design from the ICP's perspective; franchises sell the dream of entrepreneurship.

item.title: January Monthly Business Ahas
item.description: Monthly Business Aha's = MBA; to make serious decisions you need numbers and a good funnel; when you are in exploration mode an MVP is enough; it is more important to know who buys your product than who uses it; to identify the ICP ask your current customers; clients can be fans or value exchangers.

item.title: Flows of my information
item.description: I made a diagram specifically to answer the very frequent question: “How does your information flow?”

item.title: Lifechanging blog posts
item.description: The most lifechanging blog posts I have ever read

item.title: The Corporate Experience
item.description: After years of academic life, I finally had the chance to work in a corporate environment. Here are some random thoughts about this experience.

item.title: Things from Bologna
item.description: I spent the last month in Bologna working working in corporate for the first and last time. To recap the experience, I wrote in random order random stuff that caught my eye. Don't expect anything, it's just a "list of things".

item.title: I am not a mathematician
item.description: Studying mathematics is rewarding, working as a mathematician is not. Moreover, the reputation of mathematicians made it difficult for me to find a job outside academia.

item.title: Things from Graz
item.description: I spent the last year in Graz working on my master's thesis and for my first (and last) job as a researcher. To recap the experience, I wrote in random order random stuff that caught my eye. Don't expect anything, it's just a "list of things".

item.title: Test post
item.description: Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit
